settings.notes_text: Dehydrated Alfalfa Meal, Wheat Middlings, Yeast Extract, Saccharomyces cerevisiae Yeast Culture (1077), Saccharomyces boulardii Yeast Culture (1079), Dried Enterococcus faecium Fermentation Product, Dried Lactobacillus acidophilus Fermentation Product, Dried Aspergillus niger Fermentation Product, Dried Trichoderma longibrachiatum Fermentation Extract, Dried Bacillus subtilus Fermentation Extract, L-Lysine Monohydrochloride, Calcium Carbonate, Monosodium Phosphate, Glucosamine Hydrochloride, Methylsulfonylmethane, L-Threonine, DL-Methionine, d-Alpha Tocopheryl Acetate, Chondroitin Sulfate, Magnesium Sulfate, Sodium Bentonite, L-Leucine, Taurine, L-Valine, L-Isoleucine, L-Arginine Monohydrochloride, Thiamine Mononitrate, Zinc Proteinate, L-Phenylalanine, Maganese Proteinate, L-Histidine, Flaxseed Oil, Copper Proteinate, Riboflavin Supplement, Cobolt Proteinate, Salt, Pyridoxine Hydrocloride, Calcium Pantothenate, Niacin Supplement, Whey, Selenium Yeast, Folic Acid, Vitamin A supplement, Biotin, Vitamin D3 Supplement, Natural and Artificial Flavors.
Feed two scoops per day. Best if fed in two equal feedings. Enclosed scoop holds 2.65 oz.
